issue_summary: Official Kaseya status shows active Datto Workplace latency affecting multiple U.S. projects; root cause has been identified and a corrective solution is under evaluation.
why_you_care: MSP teams supporting Datto Workplace users may see file access/download slowness, user complaints, and sync/performance tickets across U.S.-hosted projects, including locally managed clients.
impact: Elevated latency and slow large-file downloads for Datto Workplace users in the U.S.; no data-integrity impact stated.
status: Identified — vendor says root cause found; fix under evaluation; next update expected early next week.
response_1: Check whether affected clients use Datto Workplace and pause non-urgent large file-transfer expectations or migrations.
response_2: Tag inbound file-performance tickets to the vendor incident and monitor status.kaseya.com for the next update before escalating duplicates.
